headline: Revvity, Bio-Techne, Corcept, Supernus Pharmaceuticals, and Phibro Animal Health Shares Skyrocket, What You Need To Know
summary: A number of stocks jumped in the afternoon session after the reopening of the Strait of Hormuz signaled a cooling of global logistics and energy costs.
